positive: A highly stylized, monochromatic depiction of cosmic flora and fauna, featuring glowing bioluminescent celestial leaves, stylized nebulae patterns, and gently orbiting ethereal moons. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong black silhouettes against a vibrant gradient of teal, deep indigo, and lavender. Emphasize clean vector-art quality, intricate line work, and a dramatic, glowing luminosity effect suitable for screen printing. Minimalist sci-fi art, highly detailed illustration, graphic design, elegant symmetry, central composition, high contrast, 4K resolution.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, grainy, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, jpeg artifacts, out of focus
